goal: Add a bounded state graph artifact report that isolates reachable eval artifact URIs, linked evals and patches, reproducibility mode, replay command, dirty-worktree evidence, and artifact relation provenance.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Eval artifact relations are projected, but operators cannot inspect artifact reproducibility evidence from graph lineage without manually reading raw eval payloads.
